gaps: AI/machine learning training use not addressed
Detailed biometric data retention policy not clearly stated
label_notes: Source: training knowledge (live fetch blocked). Cash App collects the most sensitive data of any service reviewed, including SSN, government ID, biometric data, and tax information. Encryption at rest disclosed. Block Inc. operates other financial services (Square, etc.) with potential data integration. Does not sell data for marketing but shares de-identified data. Key gap: no public disclosure on AI training use with such sensitive financial/identity data.
